So, the Python code for the function would be:

def extract_symmetric(tuples):
    sym_pairs = set()
    tuple_set = set(tuples)
    for t in tuples:
        reversed_t = tuple(reversed(t))
        if reversed_t in tuple_set:
            sym_pairs.add(t)
    return sym_pairs
